SEARCH
Package model

Class DBImplementationBook

java.lang.Object
model.DBImplementationBook
All Implemented Interfaces:
BookDAO
public class DBImplementationBook extends Object implements BookDAO
Implementation of the BookDAO interface mapping interactions to a relational database.
Author:
Iker

  • Method Details

    • openConnection

      private void openConnection()

    • getLastMessage

      public String getLastMessage()

    • getAllBookings

      public List<Book> getAllBookings()
      Retrieves all bookings from the database.
      Specified by:
      getAllBookings in interface BookDAO
      Returns:
      a List containing the retrieved booking objects.

    • createBooking

      public boolean createBooking(Book b)
      Creates a new booking using a stored procedure in the database.
      Specified by:
      createBooking in interface BookDAO
      Parameters:
      b - the Book entity containing necessary data
      Returns:
      true if the creation is successful, false otherwise.

    • deleteBooking

      public boolean deleteBooking(String idClient, int codCruise, Date startDate)
      Deletes a booking matching the provided identifiers.
      Specified by:
      deleteBooking in interface BookDAO
      Parameters:
      idClient - ID of the client
      codCruise - Code of the cruise
      startDate - Start date of the booking
      Returns:
      true if successfully deleted, false otherwise

    • updateBooking

      public String updateBooking(Book oldBooking, Book newBooking)
      Updates an old booking by deleting it and creating a new one matching the updated details.
      Specified by:
      updateBooking in interface BookDAO
      Parameters:
      oldBooking - The original booking to be deleted
      newBooking - The updated booking to insert
      Returns:
      true if the operation succeeds, false otherwise
